Infineon Products from an Authorized Distributor

BeiLuo stocks the full Infineon product range including AURIX and XMC MCUs, IGBT modules, OptiMOS and CoolMOS MOSFETs, and industrial sensors. All parts are sourced through authorized channels with full traceability.

MCU

Infineon microcontrollers span a comprehensive portfolio designed for the most demanding embedded applications in automotive, industrial, and IoT markets. The AURIX(TM) TC3xx family leads the way in automotive-grade safety computing, integrating up to six TriCore(TM) cores with lockstep redundancy and hardware security modules certified to ISO 26262 ASIL-D. These devices power advanced driver-assistance systems, domain controllers, and electrification platforms where determinism and functional safety are non-negotiable. For industrial automation and motor drives, the XMC(TM) 4000 series combines an ARM(R) Cortex-M4F core with a rich set of peripherals including the Capture Compare Unit 4 (CCU4/CCU8) and the Position Interface (POSIF), enabling precision motor control without external signal processing hardware. The XMC1000 and XMC4000 lines are popular among engineers designing servo drives, PLC controllers, and energy-metering modules. IoT and edge applications benefit from the PSoC(TM) 6 dual-core architecture, pairing a Cortex-M4 application core with a Cortex-M0+ for ultra-low-power peripheral management. With BLE 5.0 connectivity and a programmable analog front-end, PSoC 6 enables sophisticated wearable devices, industrial sensors, and smart-building nodes. As an authorized BeiLuo Infineon MCU distributor, we maintain substantial inventory across all major series and package variants. Our FAE team provides hands-on evaluation board support, migration guidance between MCU families, and application-specific code review. Whether you are scaling production or prototyping a new platform, BeiLuo delivers verified Infineon MCUs with full traceability and competitive lead times.

View MCU Products

IGBT

Infineon Technologies leads the global IGBT market with a portfolio spanning every power class from compact single-package devices to high-current press-pack modules. The H3 and H4 trench-field-stop IGBT families deliver the lowest saturation voltage in their class at both room temperature and 150 degreesC junction temperature, making them the preferred choice for string inverters, UPS systems, and induction-heating generators where efficiency directly impacts system profitability. For high-voltage industrial converters and traction drives, the IHV and IHW series push breakdown voltages to 1700 V while maintaining competitive switching losses. These IGBTs use Infineon's patented carrier-stored trench-gate bipolar transistor (CSTBT) cell structure, which shortens tail current and reduces turn-off energy dissipation compared to conventional planar IGBT topologies. In the consumer and motor-drive segment, the IKP and IKW TO-247 package devices balance cost and performance for variable-frequency drives (VFDs), servo amplifiers, and welding inverters. Reverse-blocking RB-IGBT devices enable ac-switch and matrix-converter topologies without antiparallel diodes, simplifying converter architectures and shrinking PCB footprint. BeiLuo's deep IGBT inventory covers all major package variants - TO-247, TO-263, D2PAK, and HSOF module formats - with genuine Infineon lot traceability. Our field application engineers support customers through device selection, thermal simulation review, gate-drive circuit design, and short-circuit ruggedness testing. Whether you are qualifying a new inverter platform or looking for a pin-compatible upgrade path, BeiLuo provides the technical depth and stock availability to keep your program on schedule.

View IGBT Products

MOSFET

Infineon's MOSFET portfolio spans voltages from 20 V to 950 V and on-state resistances from sub-milliohm to several ohms, giving power engineers a single-vendor solution for every stage of a modern power system. The OptiMOS(TM) 5 and OptiMOS(TM) 6 families redefine the figure of merit for low-voltage MOSFETs below 100 V, achieving RDSon x Qg products that cut synchronous-rectifier conduction losses by up to 25 percent versus competing silicon technologies. At medium voltages from 100 V to 600 V, the CoolMOS(TM) series uses Infineon's superjunction cell structure to break the silicon limit. The CoolMOS(TM) CE and CFD2 generations achieve specific RDSon below 50 mOhm-mm2 at 600 V - performance previously only available in gallium nitride - while maintaining robust avalanche and ESD ruggedness suitable for volume production. These devices dominate in PFC boost stages, active-clamp flyback converters, and totem-pole bridgeless PFC topologies. The StrongIRFET(TM) and HEXFET(R) lineages from the legacy IR brand carry over into Infineon's portfolio with proven field reliability in industrial motor drives, battery disconnect switches, and automotive body electronics. The TO-263, D2PAK, and DirectFET(R) packages offer the lowest possible parasitic inductance for high-frequency synchronous buck regulators in dense server and telecom power conversion units. BeiLuo's authorized MOSFET distribution covers the complete Infineon catalog with inventory depth in popular series across standard TO-220, TO-247, D2PAK, and SOT-23 surface-mount packages. Our FAE team provides PCB layout review, gate-drive sizing, and thermal design guidance to maximize the efficiency potential of every Infineon MOSFET design.

View MOSFET Products

Sensors

Infineon Technologies delivers one of the broadest sensor portfolios in the semiconductor industry, covering magnetic sensing, pressure measurement, current sensing, and millimeter-wave radar in a single product family optimized for both automotive and industrial end markets. The TLE Hall-effect sensor lineup spans latching switches, speed sensors, and angle sensors, all manufactured on a proprietary magnetic BiCMOS process that achieves sub-1 mT sensitivity while rejecting common-mode stray fields from adjacent current-carrying conductors. The DPS pressure sensor series represents Infineon's contribution to high-accuracy MEMS sensing for consumer, industrial, and medical applications. The DPS310 combines a resistive pressure sensing element with a MEMS temperature sensor on a single die, achieving +/-0.06 hPa relative accuracy at 1 Hz output data rate - sufficient for floor-level altitude determination in indoor navigation and ventilation control systems. For current sensing in power conversion and motor drive applications, the TLI current sensor family uses a coreless transformer approach that eliminates the magnetic saturation issues of traditional Hall-based current sensors, achieving bandwidths above 150 kHz with intrinsic galvanic isolation. The XENSIV(TM) radar sensors - KIT_XMC4700_RADAR and BGT60TR13C - bring 60 GHz FMCW radar to industrial presence detection and gesture recognition in form factors smaller than a postage stamp. BeiLuo distributes Infineon sensors with particular depth in the Hall-effect and pressure segments, maintaining stock of over thirty active part numbers across the TLE4900, TLE4966, and DPS families. Our FAE engineers bring hands-on calibration experience and can provide Python and embedded C reference code for accelerating sensor integration in customer platforms.

View Sensors Products

Why Source Infineon Components from BeiLuo?

As a Top 8 Electronic Component Distributor in China, BeiLuo provides genuine, authorized Infineon components with same-day quotation, FAE technical support, and global delivery to over 40 countries. Our bonded warehouse holds over 10,000 Infineon part numbers ready for immediate dispatch.

Whether you need Infineon AURIX TC3xx for automotive safety, XMC4000 for industrial motor control, IGBT modules for power inverters, or CoolMOS MOSFETs for efficient switching — BeiLuo has the stock, the expertise, and the supply chain to support your production schedule.
